name: mi-court-docs
description: Draft and format pleadings, declarations, motions, notices, and proposed orders for Michigan courts. Applies MCR 1.109 statewide formatting; includes Wayne County Circuit Court (Third Circuit) and Oakland County Circuit Court (Sixth Circuit) specifics plus a county-courts roll-up; supports pro se workflows. Architected as matter-neutral civil-procedure skills (MCR civil rules, MRE evidence rules, fees and costs, local rules, citation format per the Michigan Appellate Opinion Manual) plus subject-matter bundles. The first subject-matter bundle, mi-consumer-debt, covers FDCPA / Reg F / state UTPA-equivalent / chain-of-title doctrine. All workflows are skills (no slash commands) so the agent invokes them automatically from natural-language requests.
